'''Choraw''' was a [[Jazbinan]] guide for [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] while he "rescued" Princess [[Syayna]] on [[Jazbina/Legends|Jazbina]]. Choraw disappeared upon the arrival of a [[Tikulini]].

{{Char-stub}}
